pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Replace separate source and target configuration with the unified release configuration for modern Java compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard way to compile for modern Java versions (9+), ensuring consistent class file version and API usage; while source/target might still work, release is the intended migration path for JDK 21.
